channel.title: Stars on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Stars on Arrans github.io

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm
item.description: The all-in-one AI productivity accelerator. On device and privacy first with no annoying setup or configuration.

item.title: lingdojo/kana-dojo
item.description: Aesthetic, minimalist platform for learning Japanese inspired by Duolingo and Monkeytype, built with Next.js and sponsored by Vercel. Beginner-friendly with plenty of good first issues - all contributions are welcome!

item.title: google/magika
item.description: Fast and accurate AI powered file content types detection

item.title: henrygd/beszel
item.description: Lightweight server monitoring with historical data, docker stats, and alerts.

item.title: infiniflow/ragflow
item.description: RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs

item.title: sipeed/NanoKVM
item.description: Affordable, Multifunctional, Nano RISC-V IP-KVM

item.title: zed-industries/zed
item.description: Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.

item.title: MemPalace/mempalace
item.description: The highest-scoring AI memory system ever benchmarked. And it’s free.

item.title: n0-computer/iroh
item.description: IP addresses break, dial keys instead. Modular networking stack in Rust.

item.title: microsoft/markitdown
item.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

item.title: pystardust/ani-cli
item.description: A cli tool to browse and play anime

item.title: openai/codex
item.description: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal

item.title: Dokploy/dokploy
item.description: Open Source Alternative to Vercel, Netlify and Heroku.

item.title: open-webui/open-webui
item.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, …)

item.title: yt-dlp/yt-dlp
item.description: A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader

item.title: mattermost-community/focalboard
item.description: Focalboard is an open source, self-hosted alternative to Trello, Notion, and Asana.

item.title: laurent22/joplin
item.description: Joplin - the privacy-focused note taking app with sync capabilities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android and iOS.

item.title: astral-sh/uv
item.description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.

item.title: paperclipai/paperclip
item.description: Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies

item.title: tonsky/FiraCode
item.description: Free monospaced font with programming ligatures

item.title: mauriceboe/TREK
item.description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

item.title: Aorimn/dislocker
item.description: FUSE driver to read/write Windows’ BitLocker-ed volumes under Linux / Mac OSX

item.title: jamiepine/voicebox
item.description: The open-source voice synthesis studio

item.title: paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx
item.description: A community-supported supercharged document management system: scan, index and archive all your documents

item.title: DioxusLabs/dioxus
item.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.

item.title: microsoft/VibeVoice
item.description: Open-Source Frontier Voice AI

item.title: rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch
item.description: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

item.title: huggingface/transformers
item.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

item.title: tmc/langchaingo
item.description: LangChain for Go, the easiest way to write LLM-based programs in Go

item.title: f/prompts.chat
item.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

item.title: openclaw/openclaw
item.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

item.title: opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf
item.description: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.

item.title: coreyhaines31/marketingskills
item.description: Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

item.title: localsend/localsend
item.description: An open-source cross-platform alternative to AirDrop

item.title: qwibitai/nanoclaw
item.description: A lightweight alternative to OpenClaw that runs in containers for security. Connects to WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Gmail and other messaging apps,, has memory, scheduled jobs, and runs directly on Anthropic’s Agents SDK

item.title: calcom/cal.com
item.description: Scheduling infrastructure for absolutely everyone.

item.title: anomalyco/opencode
item.description: The open source coding agent.

item.title: simplex-chat/simplexmq
item.description: ⚙️ SimpleXMQ - A reference implementation of the SimpleX Messaging Protocol for simplex queues over public networks.

item.title: kopia/kopia
item.description: Cross-platform backup tool for Windows, macOS & Linux with fast, incremental backups, client-side end-to-end encryption, compression and data deduplication. CLI and GUI included.

item.title: portainer/portainer
item.description: Making Docker and Kubernetes management easy.

item.title: google-ai-edge/gallery
item.description: A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.

item.title: usememos/memos
item.description: Open-source, self-hosted note-taking tool built for quick capture. Markdown-native, lightweight, and fully yours.

item.title: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: dialogic-godot/dialogic
item.description: 💬 Create Dialogs, Visual Novels, RPGs, and manage Characters with Godot to create your Game!

item.title: jesseduffield/lazygit
item.description: simple terminal UI for git commands

item.title: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
item.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

item.title: koala73/worldmonitor
item.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

item.title: helix-editor/helix
item.description: A post-modern modal text editor.

item.title: vllm-project/vllm
item.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

item.title: torvalds/linux
item.description: Linux kernel source tree

item.title: unclecode/crawl4ai
item.description: 🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don’t be shy, join here: https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN

item.title: Lissy93/awesome-privacy
item.description: 🦄 A curated list of privacy & security-focused software and services

item.title: onyx-dot-app/onyx
item.description: Open Source AI Platform - AI Chat with advanced features that works with every LLM

item.title: exelban/stats
item.description: macOS system monitor in your menu bar

item.title: blakeblackshear/frigate
item.description: NVR with realtime local object detection for IP cameras

item.title: xournalpp/xournalpp
item.description: Xournal++ is a handwriting notetaking software with PDF annotation support. Written in C++ with GTK3, supporting Linux (e.g. Ubuntu, Debian, Arch, SUSE), macOS and Windows 10. Supports pen input from devices such as Wacom Tablets.

item.title: fluxerapp/fluxer
item.description: A free and open source instant messaging and VoIP platform built for friends, groups, and communities. Self-hosting and more activity in this repository is coming very soon! See the README.

item.title: steven2358/awesome-generative-ai
item.description: A curated list of modern Generative Artificial Intelligence projects and services

item.title: roboflow/supervision
item.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

item.title: n8n-io/n8n
item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.title: manaflow-ai/cmux
item.description: Ghostty-based macOS terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for AI coding agents

item.title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
item.description: Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.

item.title: tree-sitter/tree-sitter
item.description: An incremental parsing system for programming tools

item.title: rclone/rclone
item.description: “rsync for cloud storage” - Google Drive, S3, Dropbox, Backblaze B2, One Drive, Swift, Hubic, Wasabi, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob, Azure Files, Yandex Files

item.title: rust-unofficial/awesome-rust
item.description: A curated list of Rust code and resources.

item.title: assafelovic/gpt-researcher
item.description: An autonomous agent that conducts deep research on any data using any LLM providers

item.title: tobi/qmd
item.description: mini cli search engine for your docs, knowledge bases, meeting notes, whatever. Tracking current sota approaches while being all local

item.title: TinyAGI/fractals
item.description: Fractals is a recursive task orchestrator for agent swarm

item.title: gentoo/gentoo
item.description: [MIRROR] Official Gentoo ebuild repository

item.title: jeanslack/FFcuesplitter
item.description: FFmpeg based audio splitter for CDDA images associated with .cue files

item.title: bmad-code-org/BMAD-METHOD
item.description: Breakthrough Method for Agile Ai Driven Development

item.title: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
item.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: OpenHands/OpenHands
item.description: 🙌 OpenHands: AI-Driven Development

item.title: firecrawl/firecrawl
item.description: 🔥 The Web Data API for AI - Power AI agents with clean web data

item.title: ariga/atlas
item.description: Declarative schema migrations with schema-as-code workflows

item.title: opencv/opencv
item.description: Open Source Computer Vision Library

item.title: amir20/dozzle
item.description: Realtime log viewer for containers. Supports Docker, Swarm and K8s.

item.title: karpathy/nanochat
item.description: The best ChatGPT that $100 can buy.

item.title: linkwarden/linkwarden
item.description: ⚡️⚡️⚡️ Self-hosted collaborative bookmark manager to collect, read, annotate, and fully preserve what matters, all in one place.

item.title: massgravel/Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
item.description: Open-source Windows and Office activator featuring HWID, Ohook, TSforge, and Online KMS activation methods, along with advanced troubleshooting.

item.title: mealie-recipes/mealie
item.description: Mealie is a self hosted recipe manager and meal planner with a RestAPI backend and a reactive frontend application built in Vue for a pleasant user experience for the whole family. Easily add recipes into your database by providing the url and mealie will automatically import the relevant data or add a family recipe with the UI editor

item.title: brunodev85/winlator
item.description: Android application for running Windows applications with Wine and Box86/Box64

item.title: ollama/ollama
item.description: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

item.title: Kareadita/Kavita
item.description: Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

item.title: project-zot/zot
item.description: zot - A scale-out production-ready vendor-neutral OCI-native container image/artifact registry (purely based on OCI Distribution Specification)

item.title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
item.description: Stable Diffusion web UI

item.title: 0xSero/turboquant
item.description: TurboQuant: Near-optimal KV cache quantization for LLM inference (3-bit keys, 2-bit values) with Triton kernels + vLLM integration

item.title: janhq/jan
item.description: Jan is an open source alternative to ChatGPT that runs 100% offline on your computer.

item.title: microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
item.description: 12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!

item.title: gravitational/teleport
item.description: The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

item.title: wgh136/PicaComic
item.description: A comic app built with Flutter, supporting multiple comic sources.

item.title: dessalines/thumb-key
item.description: A privacy-conscious Android keyboard made for your thumbs

item.title: microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
item.description: 21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI

item.title: slint-ui/slint
item.description: Slint is an open-source declarative GUI toolkit to build native user interfaces for Rust, C++, JavaScript, or Python apps.

item.title: godotengine/godot
item.description: Godot Engine – Multi-platform 2D and 3D game engine

item.title: microsoft/edit
item.description: We all edit.

item.title: jellyfin/jellyfin
item.description: The Free Software Media System - Server Backend & API
